name: $sqlquery-run
description: Execute a SQL query defined within a Library resource against materialised ViewDefinitions.

parameter.name: queryResource
parameter.documentation: The Library resource containing the SQL query and relatedArtifact dependencies inline.

parameter.name: queryReference
parameter.documentation: A reference to a stored Library resource that contains the SQL query.

parameter.name: parameters
parameter.documentation: Named parameter bindings to pass to the SQL query as a FHIR Parameters resource.

parameter.name: _format
parameter.documentation: Output format - json, ndjson, csv, or fhir.

parameter.name: header
parameter.documentation: Whether to include the header row in CSV output. Defaults to true.

parameter.name: result
parameter.documentation: The query result in the requested format.
